description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on macOS 10.15 and macOS 11.0, setting up Xcode versions, installing dependencies, checking out the repository, caching third-party packages, building BioDynaMo with specific CMake options, running unit tests, and notifying Slack with a custom payload on success, failure, or cancellation.
